channel.title: 微观经济学，博弈论 on 嘉樹的世界
channel.description: Recent content in 微观经济学，博弈论 on 嘉樹的世界

item.title: Micro QE 备考练习
item.description: 本来计划做一份所有往年题的答案（已经全部做好了但希望打出一份电子版），但不幸考前🐑了，只完成此三题的誊抄，姑且留个纪念吧。 Problem 1 (stochastic dominance) Consider lotteries $L_1\equiv(p_1\circ x_1,p_2\circ x_2)$ and $L_2\equiv(1\circ \bar{x})$, where $\bar{x} > p_1x_1+p_2x_2$, and $\bar{x}<x_2$. Let $x$ denote the outcome of $L_1$ and $\widetilde{x}$ the outcome of $L_2$. ($L_2$ is a trivial lottery. So $\widetilde{x}$ is a random variable that equals $\bar{x}$ with probability one.) Let $z$ denote the outcome of lottery $$ L_3 \equiv (q_1\circ z_1, \dots, q_i\circ z_i, \dots, q_n\circ z_n), $$ where $n$ is some finite number greater than 1.
